TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-masousou ta ti Jesus ki makoilalau-lau ki Pah-tatautau-han appa tyn,
Tou kidi k'anna ni-masousou ta ti Jesus ki makoilalaulau ki Pah-tatautau-han appa tyn,
S.TRANSL: D Oe sprack Jesus tot de charen ende tot syne Discipelen
Then spake Jesus to the multitude, and to his disciples,
那時，耶穌對眾人和門徒講論，

S.FORM: K'ma, Tou ni-ierrarong-en ti Moses, da mieroung-ato ta mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen ap pa:
K'ma, Tou ni-ierrarong-en ti Moses, da mieroung-ato ta mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen ap pa:
S.TRANSL: Seggende De Schaiftgeleerde ende de Phariseen zijn gheseten op den [toel Mosts : =
Saying The scribes and the Pharisees sit in Moses' seat:
說：「文士和法利賽人坐在摩西的位上，

S.FORM: . Anna ta kamamang ka pæ-sousou-eih nein paahkoua ymou mi-an,ahkoua-au moumi-râ, âmt-auppa ta anna, râ na ryngei nein assi ahkoua auh: alei ka pasousou-en nein râ assi nein pamt'tin [k'an-na.]
. Anna ta kamamang ka pæ-sousou-eih nein paahkoua ymou mi-an,ahkoua-au moumi-râ, âmt-auppa ta anna, râ na ryngei nein assi ahkoua auh: alei ka pasousou-en nein râ assi nein pamt'tin [k'an-na.]
S.TRANSL: Darerom al war sp.u feggen dat ghy houden sult houdt [dat] ende doer [het,] maer en doet niet na hare wercken : want fp seggen Het ende en doen het nier,
All therefore whatsoever they bid you observe, that observe and do; but do not ye after their works: for they say, and do not.
凡他們所吩咐你們的，你們都要謹守遵行。但不要效法他們的行為；因為他們能說，不能行。

S.FORM: Alei ka 'æustin nein ta ul ka makdung, ka assi a-lpoughin ma-val, ka pakah-taæu-in ki kaeu-loung, râ ynnang pa-ylikalika ta neni ki kæamos nein.
Alei ka 'æustin nein ta ul ka makdung, ka assi a-lpoughin ma-val, ka pakah-taæu-in ki kaeu-loung, râ ynnang pa-ylikalika ta neni ki kæamos nein.
S.TRANSL: Want sy binden lasten die (wat zijn ende qualick om dragen ende leggense op de schouderen der menschen mae? sy en willen die met haren binge niet berroeren.
For they bind heavy burdens and grievous to be borne, and lay them on men's shoulders; but they themselves will not move them with one of their fingers.
他們把難擔的重擔捆起來，擱在人的肩上，但自己一個指頭也不肯動。

S.FORM: Ka pamt-tin nein ta ymmid ki na ringaring-ei nein ka ararau-eih ki kaeuloung. Ka paka-irang ki lyci ki pahibalei-en, ka pahou-irang nein pahoupat ta na papitpit ki koulamough nein.
Ka pamt-tin nein ta ymmid ki na ringaring-ei nein ka ararau-eih ki kaeuloung. Ka paka-irang ki lyci ki pahibalei-en, ka pahou-irang nein pahoupat ta na papitpit ki koulamough nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende alle hare wercken doen sy om ban de menschen gesien te worden. Want sp maken hare gedenck-cedels breedt ende make de roomen ban hare kleederen groot.
But all their works they do for to be seen of men: they make broad their phylacteries, and enlarge the borders of their garments,
他們一切所做的事都是要叫人看見，所以將佩戴的經文做寬了，衣裳的繸子做長了，

S.FORM: Ka kamau-en nein ta itou-gnada mieroungi tou pileileigh-en, ki taul-appa ki itou-ouro-en tou Pæuisasal-an.
Ka kamau-en nein ta itou-gnada mieroungi tou pileileigh-en, ki taul-appa ki itou-ouro-en tou Pæuisasal-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende sy beminnen de boor-aensittinge in de maeltijden ende de boor geftoelten in de Synagogen.
And love the uppermost rooms at feasts, and the chief seats in the synagogues,
喜愛筵席上的首座，會堂裏的高位，

S.FORM: Ta pasirariou-en-appa tou pænæh ka pakoi-sal tyn, ta pana-nang-en-appa ki k'æ'euloung, Rabbi, Rabbi.
Ta pasirariou-en-appa tou pænæh ka pakoi-sal tyn, ta pana-nang-en-appa ki k'æ'euloung, Rabbi, Rabbi.
S.TRANSL: Oock de begroetingen op de merckten ende ban de mentchen genaemt te worden Rabbi Kabbi.
And greetings in the markets, and to be called of men, Rabbi, Rabbi.
又喜愛人在街市上問他安，稱呼他拉比 。

S.FORM: Ymoumi-râ ynna pananang-eih Rabbi, râ saät ta Tama-mæh-tæutæuugh ymoumi-æn, ka ti vhristus: ka ymdei-au-kamou tæi-apapara ta ymoumi.
Ymoumi-râ ynna pananang-eih Rabbi, râ saät ta Tama-mæh-tæutæuugh ymoumi-æn, ka ti vhristus: ka ymdei-au-kamou tæi-apapara ta ymoumi.
S.TRANSL: Doch ghy en sule met dabbi ghenaemt worden want een is uwen Meelte? [namelick ] Chiiltus : ende ghy zijt alle broeders.
But be not ye called Rabbi: for one is your Master, even Christ; and all ye are brethren.
但你們不要受拉比的稱呼，因為只有一位是你們的夫子；你們都是弟兄。

S.FORM: Ka assi moumi ratama-auh ta timamang tou Næi, alei ka saär ta Raraman-oumi ka ææia-toun-noun ki vullum.
Ka assi moumi ratama-auh ta timamang tou Næi, alei ka saär ta Raraman-oumi ka ææia-toun-noun ki vullum.
S.TRANSL: Ende en sult niemandt uwen uwen bader noemen op der atrden : want een is uw' baDer { namelick } die inde Hemelen is.
And call no man your father upon the earth: for one is your Father, which is in heaven.
也不要稱呼地上的人為父，因為只有一位是你們的父，就是在天上的父。

S.FORM: Ka assi kamou pananang-eih Tama-mahtæutuugh: alei ka saät ta Tama-mahtautæuugh ymoumi-æn ka tip-æhristus:
Ka assi kamou pananang-eih Tama-mahtæutuugh: alei ka saät ta Tama-mahtautæuugh ymoumi-æn ka tip-æhristus:
S.TRANSL: Nochghn en fult met meelters ghenoemt worden : want een-is uw' meelter [oamelick] Chultus:
Neither be ye called masters: for one is your Master, even Christ.
也不要受師尊的稱呼，因為只有一位是你們的師尊，就是基督。

S.FORM: Râ timamang ta siouro tou keirang-en ki kidi ymoumi-æn, teni ta pæiroung-au-moumi.
Râ timamang ta siouro tou keirang-en ki kidi ymoumi-æn, teni ta pæiroung-au-moumi.
S.TRANSL: Mae} de meefte ban u fal iny' dienaer zijn.
But he that is greatest among you shall be your servant.
你們中間誰為大，誰就要作你們的用人。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta poumado pou-keirang-en ki kidi tyni-æn, anna ta pourarim-eih-da: tima mang ta pourarimæh ki kidi tyni-æn pou-mædo, ama ta pou-kei-rang-eih-da.
Ka timamang ta poumado pou-keirang-en ki kidi tyni-æn, anna ta pourarim-eih-da: tima mang ta pourarimæh ki kidi tyni-æn pou-mædo, ama ta pou-kei-rang-eih-da.
S.TRANSL: Ende wie hemselben berhoogen sal [die] sal bernedert worden : ende wie hem-felben sal bemnederen [die] sal berhooght worden.
And whosoever shall exalt himself shall be abased; and he that shall humble himself shall be exalted.
凡自高的，必降為卑；自卑的，必升為高。

S.FORM: Râ ænnæi ymoumi ka Ma-koi-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka panini-en ki rygh [ki sou:] Ilb-an-noumi ki ka'eulong ta Peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullum, alei ka assi-kamou mourbo, timamang-appa ka ynna ou-rbo, assi-moumi hahei-en pa-ourbo ta neni.

Râ ænnæi ymoumi ka Ma-koi-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka panini-en ki rygh [ki sou:] Ilb-an-noumi ki ka'eulong ta Peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullum, alei ka assi-kamou mourbo, timamang-appa ka ynna ou-rbo, assi-moumi hahei-en pa-ourbo ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Matr wee u ghy Schaift-geleerde ende Phariseen ghy gebeynde: Want ghy fluyt het Koninckrijck der Hemelen boor be mentchen obermidts ghy[daer] niet in en gaet noch de gene die ingaen souden niet en laet ingaen;
But woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye shut up the kingdom of heaven against men: for ye neither go in yourselves, neither suffer ye them that are entering to go in.
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們正當人前，把天國的門關了，自己不進去，正要進去的人，你們也不容他們進去。

S.FORM: Ennai ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen appa, ka pæ-vinien ki rÿh [ki sou: Alei ka ka-nin-noumi ta tatalagh ki jnejna ka vi-kapatei-æn ki tbung, tou hau-at-en ki hawei ki pako-daliadalli en makou Alilid. Alei ki ahna pæ-ki-valei-ei moumi ta siouro niak-dung ka ding-ding-en.

Ennai ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen appa, ka pæ-vinien ki rÿh [ki sou: Alei ka ka-nin-noumi ta tatalagh ki jnejna ka vi-kapatei-æn ki tbung, tou hau-at-en ki hawei ki pako-daliadalli en makou Alilid. Alei ki ahna pæ-ki-valei-ei moumi ta siouro niak-dung ka ding-ding-en.
S.TRANSL: Ween ghy Schaiftgeleerde ende Phariseen ghy gebeynsde : Want ghy eet de huyfen der weduwen op ende [dat] onder den schyn ban lange te bidden. Daerom sult ghy te [wacrder 00rdeel ontfangen. '
Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayer: therefore ye shall receive the greater damnation.

S.FORM: Ænnei ymoumi ka Makou-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pæ-nini-en ki rÿh [ki sou:] Ka tau ryttoung-kamou ki vaoung ki pouro-pourough pou ta'u ki væ-au ka Joden: ka rou ni-pou-tæ'u-en, pou-alak-kamou tyni-æn ki alak ki kaleu'æuan pou-pohal pou-saoun ymoumi-æn-da.

Ænnei ymoumi ka Makou-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pæ-nini-en ki rÿh [ki sou:] Ka tau ryttoung-kamou ki vaoung ki pouro-pourough pou ta'u ki væ-au ka Joden: ka rou ni-pou-tæ'u-en, pou-alak-kamou tyni-æn ki alak ki kaleu'æuan pou-pohal pou-saoun ymoumi-æn-da.
S.TRANSL: Wee u ghy Schiittgeleerde ende Phariseen ghy gebeynide : Want ghy omreplt ree ende landt om een Jode-genoodt te maken : ende als hy het gheworden is foo maeckt ghy hem een kindt der hellen tweemael mee: dan ghp [zijt.]
Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye compass sea and land to make one proselyte, and when he is made, ye make him twofold more the child of hell than yourselves.
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們走遍洋海陸地，勾引一個人入教，既入了教，卻使他作地獄之子，比你們還加倍。

S.FORM: Ænnei ymoumi ka Tama-dyllough ka mavoutta, ka k'ma, Dou timamang ta saulkit-al-ato ki sou sau-Kouva ki tatamd-en ki Alid, ka nynno ta anna: rå tima-mang ta saulkit-al-ato sau-kim ka tou Kouva ki ta tamd-den ki Alid, nda kau itting-eih ta ti anna.

Ænnei ymoumi ka Tama-dyllough ka mavoutta, ka k'ma, Dou timamang ta saulkit-al-ato ki sou sau-Kouva ki tatamd-en ki Alid, ka nynno ta anna: rå tima-mang ta saulkit-al-ato sau-kim ka tou Kouva ki ta tamd-den ki Alid, nda kau itting-eih ta ti anna.
S.TRANSL: Wee u ghy blinde lepdts-lieden die segget So wie ghesworen sal hebben bp den Tempel dat en is niet: maer fo wie gesworen fal hebben by het gout des Tempels die 1s schuldigh.
Woe unto you, ye blind guides, which say, Whosoever shall swear by the temple, it is nothing; but whosoever shall swear by the gold of the temple, he is a debtor!
「你們這瞎眼領路的有禍了！你們說：『凡指着殿起誓的，這算不得甚麼；只是凡指着殿中金子起誓的，他就該謹守。』

S.FORM: Ymoumi ka marynghau ka mavoutta kamang ta masaoun mangal ki kidi, kym kauwa, Kou-va kaua ka papa-nni ki kym tou tatamd-den ki Alid?
Ymoumi ka marynghau ka mavoutta kamang ta masaoun mangal ki kidi, kym kauwa, Kou-va kaua ka papa-nni ki kym tou tatamd-den ki Alid?
S.TRANSL: Ghpdwase ende blinde: want welck is meerder het gout ofte de Tempel die. het gout heplight +
Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gold, or the temple that sanctifieth the gold?
你們這無知瞎眼的人哪，甚麼是大的？是金子呢？還是叫金子成聖的殿呢？

S.FORM: Ka rou Yaul-kit-al-ato ki sou ta timamang ki itou-koua nki p'hik-an, ka nynno ta anna:râ tima-mang ta saul-kit-al-ato ki na pæ-pæ ka ni-pou-halap-en, ka kau it-ting-eih ta teni.
Ka rou Yaul-kit-al-ato ki sou ta timamang ki itou-koua nki p'hik-an, ka nynno ta anna:râ tima-mang ta saul-kit-al-ato ki na pæ-pæ ka ni-pou-halap-en, ka kau it-ting-eih ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Ende So wie ghefworensal hebben by den Altaer dat en is niet: mae} soo wie gesworen sal hebben by de gabe die daer op is die is schuldigh. =
And, Whosoever shall swear by the altar, it is nothing; but whosoever sweareth by the gift that is upon it, he is guilty.
你們又說：『凡指着壇起誓的，這算不得甚麼；只是凡指着壇上禮物起誓的，他就該謹守。』

S.FORM: Ymoumi ka marynghau ka mavoutta nda kamang ma-saoun na keirang-en ki kidi, na papa kaua, ytto u-kouan kaua ki pap'hik an ka papa-nni ki na pæ-pa tou tatamd-en ki Alid?
Ymoumi ka marynghau ka mavoutta nda kamang ma-saoun na keirang-en ki kidi, na papa kaua, ytto u-kouan kaua ki pap'hik an ka papa-nni ki na pæ-pa tou tatamd-en ki Alid?
S.TRANSL: Ghy dwale ende blinde: want wat is meerder de gabe of den Altaer die de gabe heplight + .
Ye fools and blind: for whether is greater, the gift, or the altar that sanctifieth the gift?
你們這瞎眼的人哪，甚麼是大的？是禮物呢？還是叫禮物成聖的壇呢？

S.FORM: Anna ta timamang ta saul-kud ki sou ki yttou-koua'n ki pa-p'hik-an saul-lik'd-den tyn ki an-na, kamamang-appa ka atta-halap en-ato hynna,
Anna ta timamang ta saul-kud ki sou ki yttou-koua'n ki pa-p'hik-an saul-lik'd-den tyn ki an-na, kamamang-appa ka atta-halap en-ato hynna,
S.TRANSL: Datrom wie fweert by doen den Altaer die fiweert by den selben ende by al wat daeropis. —_
Whoso therefore shall swear by the altar, sweareth by it, and by all things thereon.
所以，人指着壇起誓，就是指着壇和壇上一切所有的起誓；

S.FORM: Katimamang ta saulkud ki sou sau-Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid, saul-li'kd-en tyn ki anna, tyni-æn-appa ka itou-kakoua hynna.
Katimamang ta saulkud ki sou sau-Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid, saul-li'kd-en tyn ki anna, tyni-æn-appa ka itou-kakoua hynna.
S.TRANSL: Ende wie sweert by den Tempel die sweert by den selben ende by dien die daer in woont.
And whoso shall swear by the temple, sweareth by it, and by him that dwelleth therein.
人指着殿起誓，就是指着殿和那住在殿裏的起誓；

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta saulkud ki: tounoun ki vullum, saul-likd-en tyn ki ierra-raoung-en ki Alid, ty-ni-æn-appa ka ta'a raoung hynna
Ka timamang ta saulkud ki: tounoun ki vullum, saul-likd-en tyn ki ierra-raoung-en ki Alid, ty-ni-æn-appa ka ta'a raoung hynna
S.TRANSL: Ende wie sweert by den Hemel die sweert by den Throon Godts endebpdien Dit daer op fit, =
And he that shall swear by heaven, sweareth by the throne of God, and by him that sitteth thereon.
人指着天起誓，就是指着上帝的寶座和那坐在上面的起誓。

S.FORM: Annei ymoumi ka Makou-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pan-ninni-en ki rÿh ki sou, pi'ä-kamou ki atagh ka sat kytti-æn ki Munte ki dille, ki komyn appa, ka assi moumi pamtin ta siouro irang tou Tatouhko, [atta] ta dungdung en, kaharuman ki kas'hut-an [ki ni-pataumsing-en.] Nda kidi ka pamtæuh ta atta, ka assi ynnangeih ta anna.

Annei ymoumi ka Makou-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pan-ninni-en ki rÿh ki sou, pi'ä-kamou ki atagh ka sat kytti-æn ki Munte ki dille, ki komyn appa, ka assi moumi pamtin ta siouro irang tou Tatouhko, [atta] ta dungdung en, kaharuman ki kas'hut-an [ki ni-pataumsing-en.] Nda kidi ka pamtæuh ta atta, ka assi ynnangeih ta anna.
S.TRANSL: Wee ughy Schaiftgheleerde ende Pharileen ] ghy ghebepnsde want ghy ‚ btrtient de munte ende de dille ende Het Komyn ende ghy laet nae het swaerste der Wet [yamelick] het oordeel ende de barmhertighepdt ende het geloobe. Dese dingen moestmen doen ende de andere niet nalaten.

Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye pay tithe of mint and anise and cummin, and have omitted the weightier matters of the law, judgment, mercy, and faith: these ought ye to have done, and not to leave the other undone.
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們將薄荷、茴香、芹菜獻上十分之一，那律法上更重的事，就是公義、憐憫、信實，反倒不行了。這更重的是你們當行的；那也是不可不行的。

S.FORM: Tama-dyllough ka ma vouttâ, pasasakd-en-noumi ta ri-kuh, ka ryhal-in-noumi ta louang ka Kemel.
Tama-dyllough ka ma vouttâ, pasasakd-en-noumi ta ri-kuh, ka ryhal-in-noumi ta louang ka Kemel.
S.TRANSL: Ghy blinde leydtslieden die ghy de mugge uptrijget ende den kemel doorswelget.
Ye blind guides, which strain at a gnat, and swallow a camel.
你們這瞎眼領路的，蠓蟲你們就濾出來，駱駝你們倒吞下去。

S.FORM: Ennei ymoumi ka mako-sasoulat ki Fariseen-appa, ka pan-nini-en ki rÿh ki sou: pakakou ptigh-'noumi ta heuugh ka yhtan ki tangia-appa touhalap, ratourbo matmoei ta anna ki turinough-an ki assi katiktik-an ki ryb.

Ennei ymoumi ka mako-sasoulat ki Fariseen-appa, ka pan-nini-en ki rÿh ki sou: pakakou ptigh-'noumi ta heuugh ka yhtan ki tangia-appa touhalap, ratourbo matmoei ta anna ki turinough-an ki assi katiktik-an ki ryb.
S.TRANSL: Wee u ghy Schaiftgheleerde ende Phariseen ghy gebepnsde : want ghy ' reynight het buytenste des drinck-bekers ende des chotels maer ban binnen zijnle bol ban roof ende onmatig-
Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye make clean the outside of the cup and of the platter, but within they are full of extortion and excess.
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們洗淨杯盤的外面，裏面卻盛滿了勒索和放蕩。

S.FORM: Fariseus ka mavoutta koh-pa siouro-au pakakouptigh ta a tourbo ki hæuugh ka yht-en ki tangi-'appa, alei ka paka kouptig-eil-appa ta atou-halap.
Fariseus ka mavoutta koh-pa siouro-au pakakouptigh ta a tourbo ki hæuugh ka yht-en ki tangi-'appa, alei ka paka kouptig-eil-appa ta atou-halap.
S.TRANSL: Ghy blinde Phariseer sepnigght eesft dat binnen in den drinck-beke: efi de schotel 1s op dat oock het buytenlte der selbe repn worde.
Thou blind Pharisee, cleanse first that which is within the cup and platter, that the outside of them may be clean also.
你這瞎眼的法利賽人，先洗淨杯盤的裏面，好叫外面也乾淨了。

S.FORM: Ænnei ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pani-ni-en ki rÿh ki sou: ka papihmæh-kaulaul'en-kamou ki ravaravak ka tæ'apoughin, ka mahauwei matta-bung tou halap, râ matmoei tou-rbo ki toural ki patei ki kama-mang ki kavossouk-kin.

Ænnei ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pani-ni-en ki rÿh ki sou: ka papihmæh-kaulaul'en-kamou ki ravaravak ka tæ'apoughin, ka mahauwei matta-bung tou halap, râ matmoei tou-rbo ki toural ki patei ki kama-mang ki kavossouk-kin.
S.TRANSL: Wee u ghy Schiifchelcerde ende Pharileen ghy ghebepnsde : want ghy 3yt de wit-geplaesterde graben ghelyck die ban bupten wel frhoon ichijnen maer ban binnen 3hnse bol doodtsbeenderen ende aller onreynigheer.
Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! for ye are like unto whited sepulchres, which indeed appear beautiful outward, but are within full of dead men's bones, and of all uncleanness.
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們好像粉飾的墳墓，外面好看，裏面卻裝滿了死人的骨頭和一切的污穢。

S.FORM: Komnia-kamou hynna mahau-ei matiktik ki ka'euloung tou halap, râ mat moei-kamou tou-rbo ki poukakei-halap-pen ki ka-tou-koul-lan.
Komnia-kamou hynna mahau-ei matiktik ki ka'euloung tou halap, râ mat moei-kamou tou-rbo ki poukakei-halap-pen ki ka-tou-koul-lan.
S.TRANSL: Aloo oock ichijnt ghy wel den menschen ban buyten rechtbeerdigh maer ban binnen zijt ghn bol ghebeynlthepde ende ongerechtigheyt. .
Even so ye also outwardly appear righteous unto men, but within ye are full of hypocrisy and iniquity.
你們也是如此，在人前，外面顯出公義來，裏面卻裝滿了假善和不法的事。

S.FORM: Ænnei ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pan-vini-en ki rÿh ki sou:ka pei-ryngei-noumi ta ravaravak ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pei-tabung-noumi ta tih-halong-an ki pahibalei-en ki ta'u ka na matiktik.

Ænnei ymoumi ka Mako-sasoulat ki Fariséen-appa, ka pan-vini-en ki rÿh ki sou:ka pei-ryngei-noumi ta ravaravak ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan, ka pei-tabung-noumi ta tih-halong-an ki pahibalei-en ki ta'u ka na matiktik.
S.TRANSL: Wee u ghy Schaifcgeleerde ende Phariseen ghy gebepnsde: want ghy bouwt de graben der Propheren op ende berciert de graf-ceeckenen de: rechtbeerdige.
Woe unto you, scribes and Pharisees, hypocrites! because ye build the tombs of the prophets, and garnish the sepulchres of the righteous,
「你們這假冒為善的文士和法利賽人有禍了！因為你們建造先知的墳，修飾義人的墓，說：

S.FORM: Ka k'na-kamou hynna, Heirou ynna-kame akou-me'ato tou kidi ki wæ'i ki Ramou-ian, ynna-kame akousi-ato ki sau-sâl-an tou æmægh ki na Tama-mat-tæ'i-tan.
Ka k'na-kamou hynna, Heirou ynna-kame akou-me'ato tou kidi ki wæ'i ki Ramou-ian, ynna-kame akousi-ato ki sau-sâl-an tou æmægh ki na Tama-mattæ'i-tan.
S.TRANSL: Ende segget Indien wp ten tijden onser Daderen hadden geweelt wp en souden met haer geen gemeentSchap gehadt hebben aen het bloet der Propheten.
And say, If we had been in the days of our fathers, we would not have been partakers with them in the blood of the prophets.
『若是我們在我們祖宗的時候，必不和他們同流先知的血。』

S.FORM: Komma-hynna gmail-ka-mou mattæ'i-douma ymoumi-æn mamado, ka na alalak-kamou nein ka ni-pækapatei ki na Tama-mæt-. tæ'i-tan.
Komma-hynna gmail-ka-mou mattæ'i-douma ymoumi-æn mamado, ka na alalak-kamou nein ka ni-pækapatei ki na Tama-mæt-. tæ'i-tan.
S.TRANSL: Aldus getuyght ghy tegen u selben dat ghy kinderen zijt Der ghene die de Propheten gedoodt heben.
Wherefore ye be witnesses unto yourselves, that ye are the children of them which killed the prophets.
這就是你們自己證明是殺害先知者的子孫了。

S.FORM: Ymoumi ta pouht'moei ki rarpung-an ki na mamoumou-an-noumi.
Ymoumi ta pouht'moei ki rarpung-an ki na mamoumou-an-noumi.
S.TRANSL: Ghy [dan] oock berbult de mate uwer Daderen,
Fill ye up then the measure of your fathers.
你們去充滿你們祖宗的惡貫吧！

S.FORM: Ymoumi ka voelei ka ni-kubkub ki tpoung, illipt-ah-ka-mou mama ki mang ki pahko-ava-vægh-an ki kalau heu-an?
Ymoumi ka voelei ka ni-kubkub ki tpoung, illipt-ah-ka-mou mama ki mang ki pahko-ava-vægh-an ki kalau heu-an?
S.TRANSL: Gbly flanghen ghy adderen gebroctsels hoe soudt ghy de helsche berdoemenille ontblieden +
Ye serpents, ye generation of vipers, how can ye escape the damnation of hell?
你們這些蛇類、毒蛇之種啊，怎能逃脫地獄的刑罰呢？

S.FORM: Alei ki anna, k'ytt'ei, pa-dadingi-en-au-kamou ta Tama mattæ i-tan, ta Makou sacyng, ki Makou-sasoulat-appa, ka pakapa-tei-ah-kamou ki rarouma pouna-væværægh-appa neini-æn, ka pæ-tæubæurigh-ah-kamou smaplat ki rarouma tou Pæuisasal noumi, ka kmou-dylloug-ah-kamou [neini-an] tou æuma-auma.

Alei ki anna, k'ytt'ei, pa-dadingi-en-au-kamou ta Tama mattæ i-tan, ta Makou sacyng, ki Makou-sasoulat-appa, ka pakapa-tei-ah-kamou ki rarouma pouna-væværægh-appa neini-æn, ka pæ-tæubæurigh-ah-kamou smaplat ki rarouma tou Pæuisasal noumi, ka kmou-dylloug-ah-kamou [neini-an] tou æuma-auma.
S.TRANSL: Daeromsieticksende tot u Propheten ende Wijse ende Schaift-geleerde ende upt den elben sulc ghy [ommige] dooden ende kruycighen ende [ sommige.] upt Den selben sult ghy getllelen in uwe Synagoghen ende sultse berbolghen pan ftadt tot ffabt.

Wherefore, behold, I send unto you prophets, and wise men, and scribes: and some of them ye shall kill and crucify; and some of them shall ye scourge in your synagogues, and persecute them from city to city:
所以我差遣先知和智慧人並文士到你們這裏來，有的你們要殺害，要釘十字架；有的你們要在會堂裏鞭打，從這城追逼到那城，

S.FORM: Alei ka mou-halap-ah ymoumi-æn ta ymmid ki na æ-magh ka matiktik, ka ni-oudoudo en tou Nai, na amagh ti Abel ka na matiktik tou kidi-appa ki na amagh tipa-gagharias ka na Alak ti Barachias, ka ni-lpoghnoumi tou toukad ki Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid ki yttou-kouan ki pap'hik-an.

Alei ka mou-halap-ah ymoumi-æn ta ymmid ki na æ-magh ka matiktik, ka ni-oudoudo en tou Nai, na amagh ti Abel ka na matiktik tou kidi-appa ki na amagh tipa-gagharias ka na Alak ti Barachias, ka ni-lpoghnoumi tou toukad ki Kouva ki tatamd-den ki Alid ki yttou-kouan ki pap'hik-an.
S.TRANSL: Opdatopu kome alle t rechtbeerdige bloet dat bergoten is op der aerden ban het bloet des rechtbeerDigen Abels af tot op het bloedt Zacharie des soons Barachie welcken ghy gedoodt hebt tuffchen den Temperl ende den Altaer,
That upon you may come all the righteous blood shed upon the earth, from the blood of righteous Abel unto the blood of Zacharias son of Barachias, whom ye slew between the temple and the altar.
叫世上所流義人的血都歸到你們身上，從義人亞伯的血起，直到你們在殿和壇中間所殺的巴拉加的兒子撒迦利亞的血為止。

S.FORM: Missing koun-nau-kamou, ka irou 'ah ta mamang katta mou-halap ki kavouyvouyl-lan kanna.
Missing koun-nau-kamou, ka irou 'ah ta mamang katta mou-halap ki kavouyvouyl-lan kanna.
S.TRANSL: Poorwaer segge ick u alle dese dingen sullen komen obe? dit geflachte.
Verily I say unto you, All these things shall come upon this generation.
我實在告訴你們，這一切的罪都要歸到這世代了。」 （路13‧34－35）

S.FORM: Jerusalem, Jerusalem, ka Ipogh-kow ki Tama-mattæi tan, ka taka-cycyt kow ki na vahto ki padadingi-en paou-koua ymhou an Ni-mæua-pynnan ta ni-ka-moei-en-au papaululud ki alalak oho mama ki taoukka ka papa-au-alud ki pyppiou tyn tou papæ-ryl [tyn, ]rà assi-ka mou ni-bmahei-ato.

Jerusalem, Jerusalem, ka Ipogh-kow ki Tama-mattæi tan, ka taka-cycyt kow ki na vahto ki padadingi-en paou-koua ymhou an Ni-mæua-pynnan ta ni-ka-moei-en-au papaululud ki alalak oho mama ki taoukka ka papa-au-alud ki pyppiou tyn tou papæ-ryl [tyn, ]rà assi-ka mou ni-bmahei-ato.
S.TRANSL: Ferusalem Jerulalem ghp die de Propheten doodet ende steemight die tot u gesonden zijn : Hoe menigmael hebbe ick uwe kinderen willen bp een bergadert lickerwijs een hinne hare ieckenen by een bergadert onde; de bleugelen ende gylieden en hebt niet gewilt.

O Jerusalem, Jerusalem, thou that killest the prophets, and stonest them which are sent unto thee, how often would I have gathered thy children together, even as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and ye would not!
「耶路撒冷啊，耶路撒冷啊，你常殺害先知，又用石頭打死那奉差遣到你這裏來的人。我多次願意聚集你的兒女，好像母雞把小雞聚集在翅膀底下，只是你們不願意。

S.FORM: K'ytt'ei paitoukoua-auh ymoumi-au ta tallag-oumi ka ni-oubulbul-en.
K'ytt'ei paitoukoua-auh ymoumi-au ta tallag-oumi ka ni-oubulbul-en.
S.TRANSL: Siet uw' huys wort u woelt gelaten.
Behold, your house is left unto you desolate.
看哪，你們的家成為荒場留給你們。

S.FORM: Ka pasousou-en-au-kamou, Assi-kamou kmytta-ah jau-an si-augh ki kidi hnyn, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pasousou-ei-moumi, Pa-ka-riang-eih loumoulugh ta teni k'anna ka irarouroua tou Nanang ki Meirang. Kararouha kytti-an'æb ki hpat ki Ibæh ki soulat.

Ka pasousou-en-au-kamou, Assi-kamou kmytta-ah jau-an si-augh ki kidi hnyn, tou kidi-appa k'anna ka pasousou-ei-moumi, Pa-ka-riang-eih loumoulugh ta teni k'anna ka irarouroua tou Nanang ki Meirang. Kararouha kytti-an'æb ki hpat ki Ibæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Want ick segghe u Ghy en sult my ban nu aen niet sien tot dat ghy seggen sult Geregent is hy die komt in den Name des Heeren,
For I say unto you, Ye shall not see me henceforth, till ye shall say, Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord.
我告訴你們，從今以後，你們不得再見我，直等到你們說：『奉主名來的是應當稱頌的。』」
